	age = age_1_traditions
	government = steppe_horde

	requires = horse_riding_advance
	
	

	army_light_cavalry_reinforce_cost_modifier = -0.33
	army_light_cavalry_maintenance_cost_modifier = -0.33
	
	always_allow_army_levies = yes
	
	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}

	levy_maintenance_modifier = -0.5

	potential = { always = no } # M8 disables vanilla advancement
}
